ConstValues.value: "query GetTicket($searchId: String!, $locale: Language!, $market: String, $filters: FiltersStateInput, $signature: String!, $directFlightGroupKey: String, $withDirectSchedule: Boolean!) { search(searchId: $searchId, locale: $locale, market: $market, filters: $filters) { __typename ticket(signature: $signature, directFlightGroupKey: $directFlightGroupKey) { __typename directFlightsSchedule @include(if: $withDirectSchedule) { __typename departures { __typename ...DirectFlightInfo } returns { __typename ...DirectFlightInfo } } signature groupCarriers } } }"

"query pricesChartRoundTrip($origin: String!, $destination: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $minDate: Date!, $maxDate: Date!, $currency: String!, $isLuggageIncluded: Boolean, $directOnly: Boolean) { prices_round_trip( paging: { offset: $offset, limit: $limit } params: { origin: $origin destination: $destination depart_date_min: $minDate depart_date_max: $maxDate return_date_min: $minDate return_date_max: $maxDate with_baggage: $isLuggageIncluded direct: $directOnly } currency: $currency ) { __typename ...PriceDetails } }"

"query pricesOneWay($origin: String!, $destination: String!, $minDate: Date!, $maxDate: Date!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $currency: String!, $isLuggageIncluded: Boolean, $directOnly: Boolean) { prices_one_way( params: { origin: $origin destination: $destination depart_date_min: $minDate depart_date_max: $maxDate no_lowcost: false with_baggage: $isLuggageIncluded direct: $directOnly } paging: { limit: $limit, offset: $offset } sorting: VALUE_ASC grouping: DEPART_DATE currency: $currency ) { __typename ...PriceDetails } }"

"query pricesRoundTrip($origin: String!, $destination: String!, $departureDate: Date!, $maxReturnDate: Date!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!, $currency: String!) { prices_round_trip( params: { origin: $origin destination: $destination depart_dates: [$departureDate] return_date_min: $departureDate return_date_max: $maxReturnDate no_lowcost: false } paging: { limit: $limit, offset: $offset } sorting: VALUE_ASC currency: $currency ) { __typename ...PriceDetails } }"
